title: festuca ovina subvar. hervieri
intro: Festuca ovina subvar. hervieri, also known as sheep's fescue, is a subvariety of the Festuca ovina species, a type of grass native to certain regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subvar. hervieri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
